text: Moving from the structured energy of a modern conference room to the vivid, almost experimental space of an R+D exhibit, I feel a striking contrast. The first setting compels a sense of containment and collective purpose; I am an observer at the edge of communal effort. In the second, the creative displays and illuminated text invite reflection and intellectual play. Here, curiosity and possibility radiate. I feel energized and slightly disoriented by the sudden shift, as if transitioning between the focused logic of collaboration and the open-ended realm of innovation.
